heading: Legal Tree
paragraphs: Legal Tree began as a way to close the distance between legal knowledge and the people who need it most — expanding access to legal materials and running mobile legal clinics for underserved communities across Ghana.

What started as a student-union resource at Kings University College has grown into a standalone social-impact initiative, and it remains the project I'd point to first when asked what "access to justice" looks like in practice.
panelText: Partnering organisations, volunteer legal clinicians, and donors are always welcome — this is the project most worth reaching out about.
